sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '1992-09-20 20:38:40');
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = datetrunc('minute', event_time) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, datetrunc('hour', event_time) AS truncated_time FROM test_dates;
DELETE FROM test_dates WHERE event_time < datetrunc('day', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND id = 1;
